# Requirements To Plan Template

Copy this template into the relevant project note or working draft. Replace placeholders with repository-backed facts or user-provided context. Leave unknown values blank or mark them as `Unknown`; do not invent them.

```markdown
# Requirements-to-Plan — <Project or Workstream>

## Outcome

## Requirement groups

| Group | Requirements included | Delivery notes | Acceptance / exit criteria |

|  |  |  |  |

## Proposed milestones

| Milestone | Objective | Key work | Dependencies | Risks | Exit criteria |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
|  |  |  |  |  |  |

## Assumptions and unknowns

## Scope questions

## Immediate planning actions

2.

```
